content.en:
"If you want to transform the Dimension Sea, you must use the space-time particle energy in the space-time ruins to be able to transform the Dimension Sea. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, he must arrange an ultimate array to draw energy from the ruins of time and space.

With his background and perception in the Ancient Demon Era, it was not difficult to create such an ultimate array.

In the years that followed, he studied and created such a large array.

After spending a period of time, such a large array was finally created by Ye Tian.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to arrange such a large array in the Sea of Dimensions.

After a while.

Ye Tian had already arranged a large array in the Sea of Dimensions, and he only needed to urge the Great Array to attract the energy of the space-time particles from the space-time ruins to pour into the ~ Sea of Dimensions.

But don't attract too much, otherwise the countless weak creatures in the Dimension Sea will not be able to withstand the energy of space-time particles, and they will explode and die one by one, and it will take a long time and under the influence of generations to change the essence of living beings from the root and adapt to the energy of space-time particles.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian urged the Great Array, and a hole was directly cracked in the sky above the Sea of Dimensions, and a steady stream of space-time particles-energy poured in.

These space-time particle energies were still very violent, but under the suppression of the formation, they gradually became gentle.

Meanwhile.

Doomsday Extreme Venerable, Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable, they also sensed the changes in the Dimensional Sea, and they were really shocked by this large array.

"What a terrifying array!"

Shadow Sand Exclaimed.

"I can't arrange this formation. Doomsday Extreme shook his head.

"The Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable is worthy of being a terrifying existence that has broken through to the ultimate ancient demon realm in the Ancient Demon Era, even if the cultivation is low now, we can still do things that we can't do. "

Shadow Sand sighed with emotion.

With the passage of time, a large number of space-time particles poured into the sea of dimensions, and the sea of dimensions also began to slowly transform, the heavens and the earth became more and more powerful, the energy became more and more intense, and a large number of resources were gradually born.

In this way, the Terran's Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord will also have the resources to cultivate, and it will not suppress the heavens and the earth.

Soon after, the Sea of Dimensions had surpassed the Ultimate Land and was still in its metamorphosis.

It wasn't until a long time later that the Sea of Dimensions was able to accommodate many Ultimate Supreme Cultivators.

Rushing!!!

Doomsday Extremity, Shadow Sand Extremity, and many other Ultimate Extremities have come to the Sea of Dimensions to visit Ye Tian.

"Ultimate Honorable Beings, please be seated. "

Ye Tian entertained them politely.

At the beginning, he was able to break through to the Ultimate Extreme Honor, and these Ultimate Extreme Honors all had some credit, so he would not look down on some Ultimate Extreme Masters because they were too weak.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, I wonder if the formation you set up in the Sea of Dimensions can be taught to us?" asked the Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed, and immediately condensed one ball of light, all of which were the inheritance of that big array.

Buzz Buzz!!

These Ultimate Extreme Masters have all been inherited, but after they took a look, their faces changed slightly.

I don't understand!

It is true that the mysteries of time and space contained in this formation are too high and unfathomable, and they can't arrange them at all with their understanding and perception.

If they want to arrange this big array, they must comprehend the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao, and they don't understand the ultimate rules of the Extreme Dao, that is the realm that the ultimate ancient demons can comprehend, and they are too far away from this realm.

The formation inheritance is there, they can't arrange it because they are useless, if they still have to invite Ye Tian to their heaven and earth to arrange it, this is also unspeakable!

So, they only chatted with Ye Tian for a while, and did not mention the matter of building a formation.

Soon after, these Ultimate Extremes departed one by one.

Doomsday Supreme Venerable did not leave, but still said a request for Ye Tian to help arrange the formation.

"Doomsday Extreme, I can help with the arrangement, but I can only choose the ultimate place, if I decorate every heaven and earth, I don't have so much effort. "

Ye Tian said.

"The Ultimate Land can also be, after the Transformation of the Ultimate Land, we, the Ultimate Masters, can all go over there to cultivate. "

"Okay, then I'll go over and set it up, but you have to come up with the formation material resources. Ye Tiandao.

Doomsday Extreme Venerable and Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable both agreed.

Soon after.

Ye Tian went to the Ultimate Land and arranged a large array, attracting the space-time particles in the space-time ruins to pour into the Ultimate Land.

0 begging for flowers

Soon, the Ultimate Land began to transform, making countless living beings ecstatic, especially those Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lords, all excited.

Ye Tian didn't care about the affairs of the Ultimate Land, he returned to the Dimensional Sea.

After the transformation of the Dimensional Sea, the development of the human race continued to explode wildly, but it did not affect this heaven and earth.

And Ye Tian often enters the space-time ruins to find useful resources, but most of the resources are broken fragments.

But after a long time, Ye Tian was also able to find some treasures, plus his own realm was really too high, comprehending the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao, he could accelerate his own tempering, and his cultivation efficiency was also extremely high, and he could make perfect use of resources.

Time flies, and a long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation had finally reached the peak of the Ordinary Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and he was only one step away from the Peak Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

He had already comprehended the Ultimate Rule Realm of the Perfection Realm, and even the Extreme Dao Ultimate Rule Realm, and the entry to the Ultimate Rule Realm was the lowest realm at all.

Therefore, in his first thought, the bottleneck was broken.

Rumble!!!!

Endless space-time particles poured into his body, causing the space-time particle energy in the Dimension Sea to be reduced in an instant.

However, he still urged the formation and continued to attract more space-time particle energy to ensure that his breakthrough would not be affected.

And the resources he found over the long years were also directly swallowed by him and turned into resources for promotion.

His physical body is transforming, his ultimate will is also transforming, and his strength is skyrocketing wildly.

After a long time, he broke through and was already a top-notch Ultimate Extreme, not a mutilated version of other top-notch Ultimate Extremes.

Compared to him, those top Ultimate Extreme Masters were too weak, and even the Peak Ultimate Extreme Masters were extremely weak and not worth mentioning.

"Very good, break through to the top ultimate supreme, with my physical body, I can enter the space-time ruins for a long time, and it will not be affected. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In this way, he doesn't need to return from time to time, he can stay in the Space-Time Ruin all the time, go deep into the depths of the Time-Space Ruins, and find more resource doors.
